title: Squirrel Removal Wantagh, NY
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal in Wantagh, NY. Licensed experts serving Long Island homes and businesses. Humane removal, damage repair & prevention. Call today!
intro: Squirrels invading your Wantagh attic or crawl spaces? Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive squirrel removal services throughout Wantagh and surrounding Long Island communities. Our licensed technicians use humane methods to safely remove squirrels, repair entry points, and prevent future infestations in your home or business.
whyUs: With over a decade serving Long Island homeowners, we understand the unique challenges Wantagh properties face with persistent squirrel activity. Our team provides fast response times, transparent pricing, and guaranteed results for residential and commercial clients throughout Nassau County.
localContext: Wantagh's tree-lined neighborhoods near Wantagh Park and the surrounding residential areas provide ideal habitats for gray squirrels seeking shelter in attics and eaves. The mix of ranch-style homes and two-story colonials in communities near Merrick Road and Sunrise Highway are particularly vulnerable to squirrel entry through roof vents and soffits.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Wantagh?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal services in Wantagh typically range from $900 to $2,500, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and required repairs. This includes humane trapping, removal, exclusion work, and cleanup. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How do I know if I have squirrels in my Wantagh home?
faqs.answer: Common signs include scratching or scurrying sounds in your attic during early morning or dusk, visible damage to roof vents or soffits, chewed wires or insulation, droppings in the attic, and seeing squirrels entering or exiting your roofline. If you notice any of these signs, contact us immediately for an inspection.

faqs.question: Are squirrel removal methods humane?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use only humane, environmentally responsible methods for squirrel removal in Wantagh. Our techniques include live trapping and relocation when appropriate, one-way exclusion doors that allow squirrels to exit but not re-enter, and thorough sealing of entry points to prevent return without harming the animals.

faqs.question: How long does the squirrel removal process take?
faqs.answer: Most squirrel removal projects in Wantagh are completed within 3-7 days, depending on the size of the infestation and complexity of entry points. The initial trapping phase typically takes 2-5 days, followed by exclusion work and repairs. We'll provide a specific timeline during your free inspection and monitor the situation until your home is completely squirrel-free.
